recent_lines: The group ride "just for fun" and I've already checked everyone's Strava.
I packed four jerseys for a three-hour ride.
nobody told me the "social pace" would be this fast
I have 11 saved routes and I ride the same one every week.
my legs felt fine until someone mentioned the climb ahead.
three hours in and I'm already negotiating with myself about the last climb.
the moment you realise you've been drafting a stranger for six kilometres
I only ride in bad weather so Strava knows I suffered.
Four bikes in the garage. I rotate between the same one.
My Garmin has seen things I will never speak of aloud.
Why do I always eat my last gel on the way *to* the climb?
The ride was supposed to end forty minutes ago.
I packed four layers for a ride that took 90 minutes.
nobody in the group mentioned it was a 4% average — for 18 kilometres.
the café stop was "just water" and somehow took 47 minutes
